# Dossier PII patterns — owner-specific regex list for the pre-commit hook.
#
# Setup:
#   cp .github/scripts/pii_patterns.template.txt .github/scripts/pii_patterns.txt
#   (edit the copy — it is gitignored, so it never leaves your machine)
#
# Format: one Python regex per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
#
# Uncomment and replace these examples with your own identifiers:
#
# YourSurname
# your-email-local-part
# 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111
#
# Tips:
# - Use word boundaries (\b) to reduce false positives.
# - For case-insensitive matching, prefix with (?i), e.g. (?i)YourSurname
# - Validate by running: python .github/scripts/pii_scan.py
